## Mathematical intent

What theorem, theory operation, interpretation, or user workflow should become
possible? Link the dogfood script or high-level pseudocode.

## API and architecture

- Public capability/API changes:
- Dependency direction changes:
- Compatibility adapter or removal plan:

## Evidence

- [ ] Focused tests and conformance suite
- [ ] `bun run todos -- --diff <base>`
- [ ] `bun run deps:check`
- [ ] TCB/mint-site delta reviewed
- [ ] Benchmark or executable demo where relevant

## Audit notes

List unsupported capabilities, deliberate shortcuts, trust assumptions, and
follow-up TODO IDs. Loading data or adapting a backend must not silently add a
theorem-minting path.
